title: prunella grandiflora var. laciniata
intro: Prunella grandiflora var. laciniata, also known as self-heal, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family that is native to Europe and Western Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties, which help to soothe wounds and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of self-heal include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce stress and anxiety, and promote respiratory health. Self-heal can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or dried herb, and is often used in herbal medicine to treat a range of ailments, including colds, fever, and digestive issues.
